ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coffee_shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee shop */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the coffee shop is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the coffee shop */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the coffee shop's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the coffee shop's main image */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available */,
  "stars" TEXT /* Star rating given to the coffee shop */,
  "wifi_speed" INTEGER /* Wifi speed available at the coffee shop */,
  "suitable_for_meetings" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coffee shop is suitable for meetings */,
  "small_drip_coffee_price" REAL /* Price of a small drip coffee at the shop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_shops_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username selected by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall star rating given in the review */,
  "rating_ambiance" INTEGER /* Rating for the ambiance (1-5) */,
  "rating_wifi_speed" INTEGER /* Rating for the wifi speed (1-5) */,
  "rating_meeting_suitability" INTEGER /* Rating for meeting suitability (1-5) */,
  "rating_food_quality" INTEGER /* Rating for food quality (1-5) */,
  "rating_service" INTEGER /* Rating for service (1-5) */,
  "is_recommended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user recommends the coffee shop */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the review comment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the shop as favorite */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop marked as favorite */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the coffee shop was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average overall rating of the coffee shop */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings submitted */,
  "rating_ambiance" REAL /* Average ambiance rating */,
  "rating_wifi_speed" REAL /* Average wifi speed rating */,
  "rating_meeting_suitability" REAL /* Average meeting suitability rating */,
  "rating_food_quality" REAL /* Average food quality rating */,
  "rating_service" REAL /* Average service rating */,
  "total_ambiance_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ambiance ratings */,
  "total_wifi_speed_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of wifi speed ratings */,
  "total_meeting_suitability_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of meeting suitability ratings */,
  "total_food_quality_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of food quality ratings */,
  "total_service_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of service ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wifi_speeds" (
  "wifi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wifi speed record */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* The speed of the wifi in Mbps */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the wifi speed was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wifi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wifi_speeds_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_suitability" (
  "suitability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting suitability record */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop */,
  "is_suitable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coffee shop is suitable for meetings */,
  "meeting_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people suitable for meetings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suitability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_suitability_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee shop */,
  "small_drip_coffee_price" REAL /* Price for a small drip coffee */,
  "medium_drip_coffee_price" REAL /* Price for a medium drip coffee */,
  "large_drip_coffee_price" REAL /* Price for a large drip coffee */,
  "espresso_price" REAL /* Price for an espresso */,
  "cappuccino_price" REAL /* Price for a cappuccino */,
  "latte_price" REAL /* Price for a latte */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES coffee_shops ("shop_id")
)
